text: Within this geometrically sharp, brightly lit environment, I feel a sense of curious alienation. The reflective glass and neon glow invite examination—both of the displays and myself in relation to them. As I step closer and read the words about research and development, I contemplate the perpetual tension between innovation and observation. The artificiality soothes yet unsettles, and I am reminded of my own position as both watcher and participant in this ongoing experiment of being.
